items.title: FoxConnect Documentation
items.text: FoxConnect – The LINE‑First Booking & CRM Platform for Service Businesses. For full documentation visit docs.foxconnect.app.

items.title: Intro
items.text:
FoxConnect turns Thailand’s 50 million LINE users into a ready‑to‑book customer base, letting salons, clinics, fitness studios and other service providers accept appointments, manage staff schedules and nurture relationships – all inside the familiar LINE messenger interface.

The platform eliminates app downloads, streamlines every step from selecting a service to receiving instant confirmation, and automatically captures each interaction in a unified CRM that tracks contact details, booking history, preferences and notes. With real‑time calendar sync, automated reminders, two‑way chat, and a robust analytics dashboard, FoxConnect helps businesses reduce no‑shows, increase bookings by up to 40 % and gain actionable insights that drive growth.

FoxConnect leverages LINE’s dominant position to provide a friction‑free booking experience that scales from a single salon to multi‑branch clinics and beyond.

items.title: Get Started
items.text: If you’re new to FoxConnect and have just signed up, begin by working through our concise “Get Started” guide. The guide covers everything you need to configure FoxConnect quickly, from connecting your LINE Official Account (OA) to setting up the essential features that power the platform. Once you’ve completed those core steps, you can explore the remaining sections of the guide at your leisure.

items.title: Text formatting
items.text:
**bold text**
*italic text*
***bold and italic***
~~strikethrough~~
`inline code`

items.title: Links and images
items.text:
[Link text](https://example.com)
[Link with title](https://example.com "Hover title")
![Alt text](image.jpg)
![Image with title](image.jpg "Image title")

items.title: Lists
items.text:
Unordered:
- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item

Ordered:
1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

items.title: Blockquotes
items.text:
> This is a blockquote
> Multiple lines
>> Nested quote

items.title: Code blocks
items.text:
```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

items.title: Tables
items.text:
| Header 1 | Header 2 | Header 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Row 1    | Data     | Data     |
| Row 2    | Data     | Data     |

items.title: Horizontal rule
items.text:
---
or
***
or
___

items.title: Task lists
items.text:
- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Incomplete task
- [ ] Another task

items.title: Escaping characters
items.text: Use backslash to escape: \* \_ \# \`

items.title: Line breaks
items.text:
End a line with two spaces  
to create a line break.

Or use a blank line for a new paragraph.
